case_title: SF HOUSING AUTHORITY vs. ROBINSON, EARLENE

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT ROBINSON, EARLENE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, EARLENE SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBINSON, EARLENE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 140 CAMERON WAY, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $278.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $278.00, LEASE FORFEITED, 7/7/93 CLERK'S NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT & AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED.
